name: Figue Vert (Green Banana) Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Place bananas in a saucepan and add just enough chicken stock to cover.
2. Bring to a boil, reduce heat and simmer until bananas are tender, about 20 to 25 minutes.
3. Using a potato masher, mash until smooth (chicken stock will be absorbed). Let cool slightly.
4. Meanwhile, heat butter in a small frypan and saute onions until tender.
5. Add the onions, cream, beaten eggs to cooked bananas until combined; season with salt, nutmeg, and cinnamon to taste. The mixture will be quite moist.
6. Place banana mixture in a buttered shallow baking dish.
7. Combine cheese with bread crumbs; sprinkle over top.
8. Bake at 350°F for 35 - 40 minutes or until the top is golden.
Serves 4 - 6.
Note: Grated Gruyere cheese can be used instead of cheddar cheese.
